manifest.author: Dave Murray-Rust
manifest.name: Copy as Latex
manifest.description: Plugin to quickly copy markdown as Latex, with citations

manifest.author: lyqed
manifest.name: Copy Note Content
manifest.description: Copy notes to clipboard with title prepended. Supports single notes, whole folders, and a toggle to include/exclude YAML frontmatter.

manifest.author: brianling
manifest.name: Copy as Rich URL
manifest.description: Copy the current note as a rich hyperlink to the clipboard. Pastes as a single clickable link in rich-text editors like FuseBase, Notion, and Confluence.

manifest.author: @gapmiss
manifest.name: Copy as source
manifest.description: Select and copy source HTML in reading view.

manifest.author: mvdkwast
manifest.name: Copy document as HTML
manifest.description: Copy the current document to clipboard as HTML, including images, diagrams etc...

manifest.author: dho
manifest.name: Copy Embed Code
manifest.description: Adds a 'Copy Embed Code' option to right-click context menu for images. Works in Live Preview and Reading Mode, including nested embeds.

manifest.author: Nymbo
manifest.name: Copy Highlighter
manifest.description: Highlights copied text.

manifest.author: Felipe D.S. Lima
manifest.name: Copy Image
manifest.description: Easily copy image from Obsidian to clipboard by right clicking image.

manifest.author: Ali Irani
manifest.name: Copy Image Hotkey
manifest.description: Cmd+C copies the actual image when an image embed is selected in source mode.

manifest.author: Ondrej Zavodny
manifest.name: Copy Inline Code
manifest.description: Easily copy the contents of an inline code element with a single click.

manifest.author: greetclammy
manifest.name: Copy Link
manifest.description: Add commands to copy link to file, heading or block.

manifest.author: Ximkool
manifest.name: Copy Linked File
manifest.description: Copy the vault file behind an internal link or file menu item to the Windows clipboard.

manifest.author: Amy Z
manifest.name: Copy Local Graph Paths
manifest.description: Copies file paths of local graph links to clipboard.

manifest.author: wenlzhang
manifest.name: Copy Metadata
manifest.description: Copy file metadata to clipboard. Insert copied metadata to file name.

manifest.author: kzhovn
manifest.name: Enhance Copy Note
manifest.description: Augments native Obsidian note copying.

manifest.author: Robert Gomez, Jr.
manifest.name: Copy Notes to Vault
manifest.description: Copy notes and their attachments from one Obsidian vault to another

manifest.author: Chiara Marcial Martínez
manifest.name: Copy on Selection
manifest.description: Automatically copies highlighted text to the clipboard when the selection changes, mirroring Linux primary-selection behavior.

manifest.author: shumadrid
manifest.name: Copy Path
manifest.description: Adds context menu actions for copying the full/vault-relative path of files and folders.

manifest.author: Finickyspider
manifest.name: Copy As PlainText
manifest.description: Copy selections or entire notes as plain text. Both commands are available in the command palette; selection copy is also in the context menu.

manifest.author: kometenstaub
manifest.name: Copy Publish URL
manifest.description: Copy the URL of a published note.

manifest.author: skztr
manifest.name: Copy Section
manifest.description: adds a Copy button to the top of Headed sections

manifest.author: mikeddy
manifest.name: Copy Selected Name
manifest.description: Copy selected files or folders as editable @mentions with Alt+C, with append mode, history, and vault URL conversion.

manifest.author: jldiaz
manifest.name: Copy Text Protocol
manifest.description: Adds support for copying text to the clipboard using a custom protocol.

manifest.author: Musashino Software
manifest.name: Copy This Note
manifest.description: Copy the current note to the clipboard (optionally with filename and frontmatter).

manifest.author: NomarCub
manifest.name: Image Context Menus
manifest.description: Copy to clipboard, Copy URL, Open in default app, Show in system explorer, Reveal file in navigation, Open in new tab, Rename context menus for images.

manifest.author: Adi Ron
manifest.name: Strip Internal Links
manifest.description: Strips the selection or current file of internal links and either copies to the clipboard, or in-place

manifest.author: requisite
manifest.name: Copyparty Uploader
manifest.description: Paste or drop media files and have them automatically uploaded to your self-hosted Copyparty server and embedded in your note.

manifest.author: Cordari
manifest.name: Cordari
manifest.description: Sync your Cordari voice-recording summaries, transcripts, and audio into your vault.

manifest.name: Cornell Notes

manifest.name: Cosmos
